data.content: All three children implemented in a single commit on feat/foolery-c2ee-audit-ux. Data layer: preset=last24h with timestamp-aware filtering. View: removed tally, added combined All Steps chart, improved selectors with Last 24h button and range label, replaced agent table with per-step leaderboard. Tests: 35 tests covering all new helpers and filter behavior. All quality gates pass (lint, typecheck, tests, build).
